summary_one_line: Input must encode a font cmap that maps codepoint U+25CC (dotted circle) so get_nominal_glyph returns true.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font blob whose cmap subtable resolves the constant codepoint 0x25CC to a glyph id, so font->get_nominal_glyph(0x25CCu, ...) succeeds and the false branch is taken. The seed must carry a parseable cmap table keyed for U+25CC rather than an arbitrary byte run.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winning vpc seed contains a literal 'cmap' table tag at offsets 0x0c-0x0f plus a sfnt-style table directory header (00 01 00 00 ...), and on the W role the blocker line 46 takes T=0 F=1 (false branch), with downstream dotted-circle-insertion lines 49-87 marked [W] only. The I2SRandReplace mutator can substitute the cmap codepoint key 0x25CC directly into the cmap subtable from the intercepted CMP against the constant.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The value_profile loser seeds are short arbitrary byte runs (e.g. repeated 56 10 00 and UU patterns) with no valid cmap mapping for U+25CC, so get_nominal_glyph fails: the L role takes line 46 T=10 F=0 (always true branch) and only line 47 'return false' is hit ([L]). value_profile has only CMP_MAP gradient feedback and no I2SRandReplace, so it cannot inject the exact codepoint key into the cmap.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the shared CMP_MAP feedback: the per-execution CmpLogObserver captures the comparison against the cmap key and I2SRandReplace substitutes the matching bytes into the input, planting a U+25CC-resolving cmap entry. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and stalls at the Hamming-bucket gradient, never landing the exact key.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false side of a get_nominal_glyph call on the fixed codepoint 0x25CC.
value_profile_cmplog is the winner and value_profile the loser on the single I2S decisive pair.
The winning vpc seed carries a literal cmap table tag and sfnt-style directory header bytes.
On the winner role the blocker line takes the false branch while the loser role only ever takes the true branch and returns false.
On the loser role the dotted-circle insertion follows the failure path 'return false' at line 47.
The downstream dotted-circle setup is reached only on the winner role.
value_profile has only CMP_MAP gradient feedback and no I2SRandReplace mutator.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the shared havoc/token stack.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5951 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 2 --seed 94ee6502f4aed8ba` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 41 of the 42-level ancestor chain, the floor signal for an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where the input requires only matching a fixed integer key (no surrounding cmap table structure) and value_profile resolves the false branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing the divergence is not driven by exact-key substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-level link from the winning seed's 'cmap' tag to an actual U+25CC mapping is inferred from font format knowledge; the prompt does not show the resolved glyph-id mapping inside the subtable.
